crime.value: Kidnapping of a toddler (Kendra) and two teenagers by armed men who demand ransom
crime.quote: Two men ran in,one with a gun and one holding a sleeping Kendra clutching her stuffed cat named Sweetie.

victim.value: Kendra (toddler) and her sister Amy, plus friend - targeted apparently at random for ransom money
victim.quote: We've got your kid's and the other one too!We will send video's every day for a week and ask for a ransom

closed_world.value: Remote moss cabin deep in the woods where the kidnappers hold the victims
closed_world.quote: It was about 11:56 p.m before we reached an old moss cabin deep in the woods.

culprit_and_motive.value: Henry and Smokey - two men who kidnapped the children for ransom money
culprit_and_motive.quote: I scribbled down 'Smokey and Henry' so I could remember the names of our kidnappers.

resolution.value: The victims escape by stealing the kidnappers' van when sent to buy groceries, leaving captors weaponless
resolution.quote: We're going to escape!...they have no weapon or vehicle!We do!

investigator.value: The narrator (victim) who observes clues, remembers kidnapper names, and orchestrates the escape
investigator.quote: I took a piece of paper out of my pocket and a pen and scribbled down 'Smokey and Henry'

suspect_architecture.value: Two kidnappers (Henry and Smokey) as primary suspects with clear means (weapons, vehicle) and motive (ransom)
suspect_architecture.quote: Two men ran in,one with a gun and one holding a sleeping Kendra clutching her stuffed cat named Sweetie.

red_herring.value: Initial misdirection that Kendra wandered off or hid somewhere in the house before revealing kidnapping
red_herring.quote: I checked her toy box,closet,under her crib,and in her bathroom.She wasn't anywhere I checked!

clue_fairness.value: The car sound heard earlier is presented to reader simultaneously with characters' realization of its significance
clue_fairness.quote: I heard a car pull up and then drive away.That was weird...The car that we heard pull up!

social_world.value: Family structure with babysitting hierarchy - older sister responsible for younger, parents absent on date
social_world.quote: Me and Amy,Kendra's big sister,were out in her backyard practising our cheer and gymnastics while her parent's were out

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence through written note with kidnappers' names and recovery of weapons/vehicle as proof
reveal_mechanic.quote: I took a piece of paper out of my pocket and a pen and scribbled down 'Smokey and Henry'

media_and_audience.value: Explicit threat to avoid police/media involvement with death consequences for publicity
media_and_audience.quote: DO NOT call the police or the kids DIE!

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's protective instinct and fear of authority figures, rejecting police help despite danger
investigator_wound.quote: NO!!!!!!!!!I shrieked.Let's just put the phone down and everything will be OK!
